1. taking population = 4,000M in the States and 7M in HK, 583 people = 10 people in Hong Kong, in proportion

2. none of these incidents occur in public demonstration

3. for sure, there are rooms of debate regarding the use of force of US police, esp. towards Black young people as you have pointed out. But more importantly, it is way easier to obtain ammunition in the States - which is not the case for Hong Kong. Under most circumstances, Hong Kong police are not faced with deadly life threat to themselves so there are completely no grounds for them to shoot.

保障個人擁有槍枝的權利，不論該人是否屬於民兵皆然。
